schema.ion.id › logistics › provider › v1

logistics/provider/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/logistics/provider/v1#  |  Layer: L5 — Logistics sector  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

LogisticsProviderAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/logistics/provider/v1#LogisticsProviderAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
catalogVersion—Semver catalog version. Incremented on every catalog publish. BAPs use this to detect changes and trigger allocation rec
catalogPublishedAt—Timestamp when this catalog version was published
catalogValidFrom—Timestamp from which this catalog's offers are bindable. May be in the future for pre-announced rate changes.
catalogValidUntil—If present, catalog supersedes at this time. Typically absent — catalog remains valid until a newer version is published
rateCardEffectiveFrom—Sometimes rate card effective date differs from catalog publish date (e.g. publish new rates a week ahead of effective d
rateCardEffectiveUntil—
catalogChangelogUrl—URL to human-readable changelog describing what changed vs prior version
catalogDeltaReference—Reference to the prior catalog version. BAPs can request delta from /catalog/pull?from={catalogDeltaReference} to get on
nibRegistered—NIB (Nomor Induk Berusaha) business registration status
nibNumber—NIB number for registered logistics entities
siupNumber—SIUP (Surat Izin Usaha Perdagangan) trading licence number
alfiMembership—ALFI (Asosiasi Logistik dan Forwarder Indonesia) member status
asperindoMembership—ASPERINDO (express, postal, logistics association) member status
providerCategory—
aggregatorModel—True if this BPP aggregates capacity from multiple LSPs
spinesSupported—
modesSupported—
coverage—Geographic coverage declarations
coldChainCertified—Cold chain handling capability
coldChainTemperatureZones—
hazmatCertified—Dangerous goods handling certification
hazmatClasses—IATA/IMO dangerous goods classes supported
highValueCapable—Capable of handling high-declared-value shipments with enhanced security
beaCukaiLicenceNumber—PPJK (customs broker) licence for LOG-XB providers
operatingHours—
holidayCalendar—Dates when no service is provided
pickupCutoffTimes—Latest time to request pickup for same-day or next-day dispatch per corridor
fleetType—
maxDeliveryRadiusKm—Maximum service radius for hyperlocal providers
warehouseLocations—For LOG-WAREHOUSE providers
fwaApplicable—Whether this provider accepts Framework Agreement-governed transactions

Pack README

provider/v1

Logistics provider attributes. Attaches to `beckn:Provider.providerAttributes`.

What it covers

Identity and licences (NIB, SIUP, ALFI, ASPERINDO), provider model (carrier vs forwarder vs aggregator vs 3PL/4PL vs warehouse), spines and modes supported, geographic coverage, capabilities (cold chain, hazmat, high-value, customs brokerage), operating hours, fleet type, warehouse locations.

Mandatory fields (always)

`nibRegistered`, `providerCategory`, `spinesSupported`, `modesSupported`, `coverage[]`, `operatingHours[]`

Conditional fields

`siupNumber` (freight and warehouse), `beaCukaiLicenceNumber` (LOG-XB providers), `coldChainTemperatureZones` (if coldChainCertified=true), `hazmatClasses` (if hazmatCertified=true), `warehouseLocations[]` (LOG-WAREHOUSE providers), `maxDeliveryRadiusKm` (LOG-HYPERLOCAL providers).

Used in spines

All logistics spines. Fields applicable per spine are documented in each spine's conditional field list.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/logistics/provider/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-27 18:43 UTC.
